Lobby.subtitle: An asynchronous turn-based wargame. Take your turn, then check back later for your opponent's move.
Lobby.loginHeading: Enter a player name (simple dev login)
Lobby.noMatches: No matches yet. Create one below, or join with a shared match ID.
Lobby.createMatchHeading: Create a new match (pick faction, leader, and map; share the match ID with your opponent)
Lobby.joinMatchHeading: Join with a match ID (pick faction and leader)
Lobby.tutorialHeading: 📖 Tutorial (learn the rules vs. CPU, no login required)

CreateMatchForm.fogTitle: Fog: hides enemies outside your units' line of sight
CreateMatchForm.maxTurnsTitle: Max turns (optional): the match ends in a draw if exceeded
CreateMatchForm.footerNote: You can pick any level-2+ unit from your faction as leader. Losing your leader means defeat.

Board.fogTitle: Fog: enemies outside your line of sight are hidden
Board.incomeTitle: Income per turn: base {base} + villages {villageGold} − upkeep {upkeepPaid}
Board.endTurnConfirmMsg: {count} unit(s) haven't acted yet. End turn anyway?
Board.surrenderConfirmMsg: Surrender this match? You'll lose immediately.
Board.recruitPlaceInstruction: Tap a highlighted castle hex to place {name}
Board.moveInterrupted: ⚠️ A hidden enemy blocked the way — movement was interrupted!

LoadingScreen.dismissTitle: Units that failed to load will show as plain circles

CpuMatchView.cpuEndsHere: (the CPU match ends here and isn't saved)
CpuMatchView.practiceModeLabel: 🤖 CPU practice mode (vs. {faction}, results aren't saved)

MatchView.waitingHeading: Waiting for your opponent to join
MatchView.waitingInstruction: Share this match ID with your opponent (they can join from "Join with a match ID" in the lobby):
MatchView.cpuPracticeHeading: 🤖 Play vs. CPU while you wait
MatchView.cpuPracticeNote: Practice against the CPU with the same settings (faction, map{fogSuffix}). Results aren't saved, and you can start the real match as soon as your opponent joins.

TurnLogPanel.heading: Opponent's turn log
TurnLogPanel.replayAllTitle: Replay the opponent's battles in order as cut-ins
TurnLogPanel.replayButtonTitle: Replay this battle as a cut-in
TurnLogPanel.spottedShadow: A shadow that looked like {name} came into view
